= timestamp

Converts a value to a timestamp with optional fallback.


== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `default` (optional)
| `timestamp`
| An optional value to yield if the target cannot be parsed as a timestamp.

|===


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo = this.ts.timestamp()
root.bar = this.none.timestamp(1234567890.timestamp())
----
